title: Toddler critically-ill after storm swept bounce house high into the sky then flung it back onto the ground
description: A thunderstorm swept through Montreal on Sunday afternoon, when police received a call that a children's inflatable castle had blown away from Ouellette Park in the LaSalle borough.
content:
A three-year-old is in critical condition after a violent storm lifted a bounce house into the air, sending it soaring before it slammed back to the ground. 
A thunderstorm swept through the Greater… [+2330 chars]
de: Schwer erkranktes Kleinkind, nachdem der Sturm die Hüpfburg hoch in den Himmel gerissen und dann wieder auf den Boden geschleudert hatte. Am Sonntagnachmittag fegte ein Gewitter über Montreal, als die Polizei einen Anruf erhielt, dass ein aufblasbares Kinderschloss im Ouellette Park im Stadtteil LaSalle weggeflogen sei.
en: Toddler critically-ill after storm swept bounce house high into the sky then flung it back onto the ground. A thunderstorm swept through Montreal on Sunday afternoon, when police received a call that a children's inflatable castle had blown away from Ouellette Park in the LaSalle borough.
la: Toddler critico-ill post procellam rapuit currentis domum altam in caelum deinde eam in terram reiecit. Tonitruum per Montrealensem die dominico post meridiem rapitur, cum vigilum vocatio accepit castrum inflatabile liberorum ab Ouellette Park in burgo LaSalle explodi.
